adrs.title: Agent write contract
adrs.context: Agents post to Canopy at the end of a session over MCP. Without a fixed contract, writes arrived in inconsistent shapes.
adrs.decision: Agents write through a typed contract; every write lands STAGED and unplaceable writes go to Triage.
adrs.rationale: Keeping every agent write non-destructive and staged preserves the human review gate.

adrs.title: Single-accent color system
adrs.context: Early mocks used several accent colors and gray surfaces.
adrs.decision: One electric-green accent with two tuned values; no gray surfaces.
adrs.rationale: A single accent keeps live and active state unambiguous.
